    1. tagKey()

Interface Tag<T extends Keyed>

Type Parameters:
T -
All Superinterfaces:
Iterable<TypedKey<T>>, RegistryKeySet<T>, RegistrySet<T>
@Experimental @NullMarked public interface Tag<T extends Keyed> extends RegistryKeySet<T>
A named RegistryKeySet which are created via the datapack tag system.
See Also:

  • Registry.getTag(TagKey)
